name: lazyfonts
description: LazyFonts — a Telegram bot that extracts font files from ZIP archives (including nested ZIPs) and repackages them flat. Runs as a single Cloudflare Worker.

scripts.//: No local dev scripts — this project is deployed via Cloudflare's dashboard Git integration. See setup.md.
scripts.deploy-hint: echo 'Deploy through the Cloudflare dashboard (Workers → Create → Connect Git). See setup.md.'
